title: Affiliate / Referral commission in the monetization SDK
excerpt:
Hi folks, 
Is there a way to integrate an affiliate or referral commission system with the monetization SDK? 
We want to incentivize our current users to refer our app to others using a referral link.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks,

Is there a way to integrate an affiliate or referral commission system with the monetization SDK?
We want to incentivize our current users to refer our app to others using a referral link.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kranthi_thoughtflow
As of now, referral monitization is not something we support. So I changed your post to a feature request so other users can vote on it and the team can review it.

Have a wonderful week.
